name: resolve-loopback-host-http-scheme
description: A `bundleHost` resolving to localhost (`localhost`, `127.0.0.1`, or `0.0.0.0`, each optionally with a port). The resolver MUST emit the `http://` scheme for loopback hosts: a local-registry workflow publishes over `http://`, and an `https://` render URL would mixed-content-block in the sandboxed iframe. Every non-loopback host gets `https://`.
